name: product-launch-planner-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Generate a structured product launch plan with phased timelines, task checklists, owner assignments, and channel strategies for e-commerce launches.
author: genpark

product_name.description: Name of the product to launch.

launch_date.description: Target launch date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

phases.description: Launch phases with start/end dates and task lists.

total_tasks.description: Total number of launch tasks generated.

budget_allocation.description: Recommended budget split across channels and activities.
